languages.text: "Ирлиэт, научи жителей Заркова создавать ловушки по лекалам твоего народа".

traits.locale_text: "Ирлиэт, научи жителей Заркова создавать ловушки по лекалам твоего народа".

languages.text: "Yrliet, teach the people of Zarkov how to construct traps according to the ways of your kind."
languages.original_text: "Ирлиэт, научи жителей Заркова создавать ловушки по лекалам твоего народа".

traits.locale_text: "Yrliet, teach the people of Zarkov how to construct traps according to the patterns of your kind."
"Yrliet, teach the people of Zarkov how to construct traps according to the ways of your kind."
"Yrliet, I do not wish to maim Zarkov any further. Teach the Merovians your ways."
"Yrliet, teach the people of Zarkov how to construct traps according to the patterns of your kind."
"Yrliet, teach the people of Zarkov how to construct traps according to the ways of your kind."

languages.text: 「イェルリエット、私はザルコフをさらに傷つけたくない。メロヴィアンにあなたの教えを伝えてくれ」
languages.original_text: "Yrliet, I do not wish to maim Zarkov any further. Teach the Merovians your ways."

traits.locale_text: 「イェルリエット、私はザルコフをさらに傷つけたくない。メロヴィアンにあなたの教えを伝えてください。」

languages.text: «Yrliet, enseña a la gente de Zarkov a construir trampas dignas de tu gente».
languages.original_text: "Yrliet, teach the people of Zarkov how to construct traps according to the ways of your kind."

traits.locale_text: «Yrliet, enseña a la gente de Zarkov a construir trampas dignas de tu gente».

languages.text: “伊莉耶特，教扎尔科夫人按照你们一族的方式布设陷阱。”
languages.original_text: "Yrliet, teach the people of Zarkov how to construct traps according to the ways of your kind."

traits.locale_text: “伊莉耶特，教扎尔科夫人按照你们一族的方式布设陷阱。”

languages.text: "Yrliet, bringt den Bewohnern von Zarkov bei, wie man Fallen baut."
languages.original_text: "Yrliet, teach the people of Zarkov how to construct traps according to the ways of your kind."

traits.locale_text: "Yrliet, bringt den Bewohnern von Zarkov bei, wie man Fallen baut."

languages.text: "Yrliet, Zarkov halkına senin türünün yöntemlerine göre nasıl tuzak kurulacağını öğret."
languages.original_text: "Yrliet, teach the people of Zarkov how to construct traps according to the ways of your kind."

traits.locale_text: "Yrliet, Zarkov halkına senin türünün yöntemlerine göre nasıl tuzak kurulacağını öğret."

languages.text: « Yrliet, apprenez au peuple de Zarkov à fabriquer des pièges selon vos coutumes. »
languages.original_text: "Yrliet, teach the people of Zarkov how to construct traps according to the ways of your kind."

traits.locale_text: « Yrliet, apprenez au peuple de Zarkov à fabriquer des pièges selon vos coutumes. »
